description_short: Adds a toolbar button (in the tool group, after Upgrade) that opens a picker for placing oil/water deposits or instantly fulfilling terrain designations with chosen material, without sandbox mode. F9 is a keyboard shortcut.
description_long:
Map-design cheats usable in any game without enabling sandbox mode (which is irreversible).

Click the new toolbar button (in the tool group, after Upgrade) or press F9 to open a pinnable picker panel with two action sections.

Place virtual resource: click oil or groundwater to enter a modal placement mode. Shift+wheel changes radius, Ctrl+wheel changes quantity in 1k steps, Alt+wheel cycles resource (plain wheel still zooms the camera). Left-click places, right-click exits. Existing deposits are not modified.

Fulfill designations: pick any dumpable material (rocks, dirt, ore, sand), or leave empty for the designation's default, and click the Fulfill button. Then click+drag a rectangle on the terrain; every dumping, leveling, or mining designation whose center falls inside the rectangle is instantly realized using the selected material. Place the designators themselves with the game's normal toolbar tools first. The material picker stays interactive while the fulfill tool is active, you can change material and the next click uses the new selection.
